sprints.name: Sprint 1 — Schema & Citation Optimization
sprints.cycle: Unified week (Wed Apr 1 @ 1 AM CET, Sat Apr 4 @ 1 AM CET)
sprints.focus: JSON-LD Schema + Author Entity + AI Citation Optimization

sprints.name: Sprint 2 — Authority & Navigation
sprints.cycle: Unified week (Wed Apr 8 @ 1 AM CET, Sat Apr 12 @ 1 AM CET)
sprints.focus: Author Entity Completion + Category Landing Pages + Internal Linking + Related Articles
sprints.expectedImpact: +20% pages per session, improved E-E-A-T signals

sprints.name: Sprint 3 — UX & Performance
sprints.cycle: Unified week (Wed Apr 15 @ 1 AM CET, Sat Apr 19 @ 1 AM CET)
sprints.focus: Social Share Buttons + Reading Progress Indicator + Site Speed Optimization
sprints.expectedImpact: +10% organic traffic, improved page load times

sprints.name: Sprint 4+ — Discovery & API
sprints.cycle: Unified week (Wed Apr 22 @ 1 AM CET, Sat Apr 26 @ 1 AM CET, recurring)
sprints.focus: LLMs.txt Enhancement + Research API Endpoint + Archive/Timeline View + Future Features

ai_citation_rate.name: AI Citation Rate
ai_citation_rate.description: Percentage of mentions that cite Vibe Factory content across Perplexity, ChatGPT, Claude, and other major AI systems
ai_citation_rate.dataSource: Semrush API, Ahrefs, manual audit via AI systems
ai_citation_rate.target: Establish baseline by Apr 10, then +15-25% per sprint

organic_traffic.name: Organic Traffic
organic_traffic.description: Unique users arriving via Google Search (GSC data)
organic_traffic.target: Baseline by Apr 10, target +30% by Q2 end

social_shares.name: Social Shares
social_shares.description: Total shares via integrated share buttons + manual X/LinkedIn posts

pages_per_session.name: Pages Per Session
pages_per_session.description: Average pages viewed per user session

bounce_rate.name: Bounce Rate
bounce_rate.target: Reduce by 15% through better internal linking

hypotheses.name: NewsArticle + Author schema increases AI citations
hypotheses.description: AI models leverage structured data (NewsArticle schema, author entity, datePublished) to identify authoritative sources. Implementing proper schema should increase citation frequency.
hypotheses.reasoning: AI systems like Perplexity and ChatGPT use schema.org markup to understand content authority and relevance. Explicit NewsArticle + Author entity signals ownership and expertise.

hypotheses.name: Internal linking improves pages per session
hypotheses.description: Strategic internal links from summary/conclusion sections to related research increases session depth and time on site.
hypotheses.reasoning: Users follow contextual links when they're relevant. Better structure = more exploration = longer sessions = better SEO signals.

hypotheses.name: Keyword optimization increases organic visibility
hypotheses.description: Targeting high-intent, low-competition keywords in headers and early paragraphs improves organic search rankings.
hypotheses.reasoning: Primary keywords in H1, featured snippet optimization, and long-form content targeting question-based searches improve SERP position.

backlog.title: Implement link reclamation
backlog.description: Identify unlinked mentions of Vibe Factory and reach out for citations

backlog.title: AI answer engine submission
backlog.description: Submit content directly to Perplexity, ChatGPT, and Claude plugins for faster indexing
backlog.estimatedImpact: Reduce AI citation lag from 2-3 weeks to 3-5 days

backlog.title: Featured snippet optimization
backlog.description: Restructure top articles to target Google Featured Snippets

backlog.title: Implement generative discovery tags
backlog.description: Add GEO-specific metadata for Google's generative discovery results
backlog.estimatedImpact: Enable Google SGE placement (new traffic channel)

backlog.title: Social engagement loop
backlog.description: Implement reply-to-comments system on X posts with relevant article links
